webinarComponent.howToJoinData3: No problem! Go ahead and register, and we’ll send you a recording of the webinar afterward, so you can watch it whenever it suits you best.

CIGWebinar.webinarTitle: CIG, Your Gateway to SAP Ariba
CIGWebinar.webinarInfo: Join us for an exclusive webinar to explore how the Ariba Cloud Integration Gateway (CIG) seamlessly connects your SAP ERP (S/4HANA) with the Ariba Network. Discover how CIG centralizes and streamlines procurement transactions, simplifies integration management, and accelerates your journey to smarter, synchronized procurement operations.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Simplified Integration:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: How CIG bridges SAP ERP and Ariba effortlessly.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: CIG Architecture:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Dive into key components and how they work together.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Self-Service Portal:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Learn how to configure, test, and monitor integrations.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Real-World Use Cases:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Practical examples of how organizations benefit from CIG.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Implementation Best Practices:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Tips for faster deployment and effective error handling.

whoShouldAttendData: Anyone looking to simplify and optimize SAP Ariba integrations

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Introduction to SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Understand how Onboarding 2.0 transforms the new hire experience from pre-boarding to productivity.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Key Features & Comparative Analysis:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Explore what’s new in Onboarding 2.0 vs. 1.0, including smarter task flows, better customization, and enhanced user experience.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Step-by-Step Workflow & Implementation:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Get a clear roadmap of the ONB 2.0 implementation journey—from configuration to go-live.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Seamless Integration with Employee Central:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Discover how deep integration ensures data consistency and streamlined HR processes.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Smarter Task Management & Digital Tools:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Learn how dashboards, e-signatures, and task automation elevate the onboarding process.

webinarAdvantagesData.title: Greater Admin Control & Customization:
webinarAdvantagesData.data: Unlock new levels of flexibility with advanced business rules, notifications, and personalized workflows.

successFactorWebinar.webinarTitle: What’s New with SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0
successFactorWebinar.webinarInfo: Unveil the more efficient way of Employee Onboarding.Join us for an insightful webinar that illustrates the latest enhancements in SAP SuccessFactors Onboarding 2.0, aimed at improving the new hire experience from pre - boarding to day one and so on, and highlights how it transforms and streamlines the onboarding journey compared to its predecessor, SAP Onboarding 1.0.
